recommendations.title: Fiasco in Milan
recommendations.overview: The usual gang of robbers are hired by a thief from Milan to steal a suitcase full of money, but troubles will hinder the success of the operation.

recommendations.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

recommendations.title: Submarine

recommendations.title: 1942: Unknown Battle
recommendations.overview: WWII 1942: Rzhev, USSR. Stuck in a crucial strategical position, a small company from the Red Army does whatever it takes to fend off the Nazis.

recommendations.title: The Scary House
recommendations.overview: When a big-city family moves to a remote town, two young brothers and their new friends try to solve the menacing mystery that haunts their home.
